rulings.Case Title: JULIE WANG VS. JOANNE M REMING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Application For Order Dismissing Action For Failure To Amend Complaint After Demurrer Was Sustained With Leave To Amend
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 27, 2008, line 3, DEFENDANTS STIMMEL, STIMMEL & SMITH, P.C., LEE STIMMEL, AND ANDRINE SMITH'S Notice Of Hearing On Application For Order Dismissing Action For Failure To Amend Complaint After Demurrer Was Sustained With Leave To Amend. GIVEN THE STATE OF THE RECORD, THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF'S DELAY IS LIKELY EXCUSABLE NEGLECT ONCE DEFENDANT IS TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT WITHIN 5 DAYS. FURTHER THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO SEEK LEAVE OF COURT BY A CALENDARED MOTION OR BY AN EX PARTE MOTION BEFORE FILING ANY FURTHER NOTICES OF UNAVAILABILITY. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN SHIRLEY et al VS. SOPHIE LAU et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 27, 2008, line 8, DEFENDANTS SOPHIE LAU AND JEFFREY LAU'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE NON-ATTORNEY REPRESENTATION IS A CURABLE DEFECT AND NO PURPOSE WOULD BE SERVED BY SUSTAINING THE DEMURRER FOR THE PROBLEM HAS BEEN CURED. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN SHIRLEY et al VS. SOPHIE LAU et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 27, 2008, line 8, DEFENDANTS SOPHIE LAU AND JEFFREY LAU'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. DOWDY IS NOT AN INDISPENSABLE PARTY FOR HE ALLEGEDLY WAS ACTING AS DEFENDANT'S AGENT. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: MARC LUMER & COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. EAGLE ENVIRONMENTAL TECHNOLOGIES, INC., A NEVADA et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 27, 2008, line 9, CROSS-DEFENDANT MARC LUMER & COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF SHOULD HAVE BEEN AWARE OF ITS CLAIM WHEN THE SEC SUSPENDED ITS ABILITY TO TRADE ON FEBRUARY 27, 2006. THE CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE TWO YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, CCP 339(1). =(302/PJM/AY)
